name: MCP Bridge
description: Connect MCP servers and register their tools as native OpenClaw agent tools.

servers.description: MCP server configurations keyed by server name

command.description: Command to start the MCP server (for stdio transport)

args.description: Arguments for the command (for stdio transport)

env.description: Environment variables for the subprocess (for stdio transport)

servers.label: MCP Servers
servers.help: Configure MCP servers to connect. Each server's tools become available as native OpenClaw tools.
